title: creusa tetragona subsp. rudis
intro: Creusa tetragona subsp. rudis, also known as the Rough-leaved Creusa, is a plant species within the genus Creusa, characterized by its distinctive rough-leaved foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Creusa tetragona subsp. rudis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
